How we do it
Our experts provide all services and support for you to adopt or improve your use of Lean, Agile and DevSecOps for software development.
To execute a full agile transformation, you need typically a variety of services such as consulting, training & education, coaching, implementation services, tools and automation, audit & assessment, large group facilitation services and at last agile culture change management.
Overall, we are Agile transformation experts help organizations to improve their ability to deliver software faster, better align with business goals, increase collaboration, and improve quality and customer satisfaction by providing guidance, training, implementation, and ongoing support for Agile methodologies and practices.

default.title: WHAT IS SAFe
default.content:
What is SAFe®?
What is Scaled Agile?
Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) is a set of best-practises used to manage and execute large-scale software development projects, particularly in an enterprise environment.
It is based on the principles of Lean-DevSecOps and Agile software development and is designed to be flexible and scalable for organizations of different sizes and industries.
Why SAFe®?
SAFe® is intended to help teams work together more efficiently and effectively, and to deliver software faster and with higher quality.
It includes principles, practices, and roles for managing and coordinating work across multiple teams, and it provides a framework for planning, tracking, and delivering software releases.
Benefits of SAFe®
More than 1,000,000 individuals in 20,000 companies around the world have acknowledged the benefits of scaling agile with SAFe.
Aggregated customer case studies have shown the following typical results:
typical results from scaledagile.com/customer-stories
The Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) can provide therefore also several benefits for you including:
 Faster delivery of software : SAFe helps teams work together more efficiently and effectively, which can lead to faster delivery of software.
 Increased collaboration : SAFe encourages collaboration across teams and departments, which can help to improve communication and coordination.
 Improved quality : SAFe includes practices for managing and testing software, which can help to improve the quality of the software being delivered.
 Better alignment with business goals : SAFe helps organizations align their software development efforts with their overall business goals and objectives.
 Greater visibility : SAFe provides a framework for planning, tracking, and delivering software releases, which can help organizations to better understand the status of their software development efforts and identify potential issues early on.
 Better scalability : SAFe is designed to be flexible and scalable, which can help organizations to better manage large-scale software development projects and adapt to changing business needs.
Which Dutch Clients are using SAFe®

default.title: SAFe TRANSFORMATIONS
default.content:
SAFe® Transformations
Why ?
There are several reasons why an organization might choose to execute an Agile transformation:
Faster delivery of software: Agile methods can help teams to deliver software faster, by breaking down large projects into smaller, more manageable chunks and working in short, incremental cycles.
Increased flexibility: Agile methods can help organizations to be more responsive to changing business needs, by allowing them to adapt and make changes to projects more easily.
Improved collaboration: Agile methods encourage collaboration and communication among team members, which can lead to better results and higher-quality software.
Better alignment with business goals: Agile methods help organizations to align their software development efforts with their overall business goals and objectives.
Greater visibility: Agile methods provide a framework for planning, tracking, and delivering software releases, which can help organizations to better understand the status of their software development efforts and identify potential issues early on.
Improved customer satisfaction: Agile methods enable organizations to deliver software that meets customers’ needs by involving them in the development process and getting their feedback.
Better scalability: Agile methods can help organizations to better manage large-scale software development projects and adapt to changing business needs.
Improved employee satisfaction: Agile methods can help employees feel more engaged and motivated by giving them more autonomy, purpose, and a sense of ownership in their work.
Overall, Agile transformation can help organizations to be more efficient, effective and competitive by delivering software faster, better aligning with business goals, increasing collaboration, and improving quality and customer satisfaction.
Our approach
The steps for an Agile transformation can vary depending on the specific organization and its needs, but a general process for executing an Agile transformation might include the following steps:
 Assess the current state : Understand the current processes, workflows, culture, and pain points of the organization.
Understand the specific needs of the organization, what is working well, and what areas need improvement.
 Define the vision : Define the goals and objectives of the Agile transformation, and create a clear vision of what success looks like.
 Create a plan : Develop a detailed plan for how to implement Agile practices and methodologies, including timelines, resources, and roles and responsibilities.
 Build a core team : Assemble a core team of key stakeholders and Agile experts to lead the Agile transformation.
 Develop a governance model : Establish a governance model that supports the Agile transformation and ensures compliance with Agile principles and practices.
 Train and educate : Provide training and education for all team members on Agile methodologies, practices, and tools.
 Implement Agile practices : Begin implementing Agile practices, such as Scrum, Kanban, and Lean, and adjust as necessary based on feedback and results.
 Measure and monitor progress : Establish metrics to measure progress and success of the Agile transformation, and monitor progress regularly.
 Continuously improve : Continuously review and improve the Agile transformation, making adjustments as necessary to ensure continued success.
 Create a culture of Agile : Create a culture that supports and encourages Agile principles and practices, and make sure that Agile values are embedded in the organization's culture.
It's worth noting that Agile Transformation is a continuous journey and not a one-time project.
It requires constant improvement and adaptation to the change and progress.
Our Agile transformation manifesto
Welcome to our Agile Transformation Manifesto.
This section outlines our core values and principles that guide our approach to agile transformations.
We believe that by embracing these values, organizations can become more adaptive, efficient, and innovative.
These values are not only important for the success of an Agile Transformation, but they also act as a guide for the team and the organization to achieve their goals and objectives in a more efficient and effective way.
Together, we can create a culture of continuous improvement and foster a more agile way of working.
We value individuals and interactions over processes and tools.
We value working software over comprehensive documentation.
We value customer collaboration over contract negotiation.
We value responding to change over following a plan.
We value delivering value to the customer over maximizing resource utilization.
We value fostering a culture of continuous improvement over maintaining the status quo.
We value empowering teams to make decisions over centralizing decision-making.
We value creating a transparent and inspectable process over hiding problems.
We value fostering a culture of experimentation and learning over adhering to a rigid plan.
We value building a sustainable pace of work over pushing for short-term gains.

default.title: defensie
default.content:
Meld je aan voor SAFe trainingen
Op deze registratiepagina kun je je aanmelden en onderdeel worden van ons register van geïnteresseerden voor onze aankomende SAFe trainingen.
 Hoe werkt het?
 Aanmelding: Vul het aanmeldingsformulier op deze pagina in om je interesse in onze SAFe trainingen kenbaar te maken.
Het kost slechts een paar minuten!
 Registratie: Zodra je je hebt aangemeld, word je toegevoegd aan ons register van geïnteresseerden.
Dit register helpt ons bij het plannen en organiseren van de trainingen.
 Planning: Op basis van de aanmeldingen plannen we verschillende cursusdata.
We houden hierbij rekening met de beschikbaarheid en voorkeuren van onze deelnemers.
 Informeren: Zodra de cursusdata zijn vastgesteld, ontvang je een bericht met de beschikbare data en verdere details over de training.
Zo kun je de data kiezen die het beste in jouw agenda passen.
 Bevestiging: Na jouw keuze ontvang je een bevestiging van je inschrijving en verdere instructies voor de training.
 Waarom aanmelden?
 Door je aan te melden, ben je verzekerd van een plek in een van onze hooggewaardeerde SAFe trainingen.
Tevens is zijn de gegevens nodig voor het inkopen van jou examen training en licentie bij Scaled Agile Incl in Amerika.
En tot slot blijf je op de hoogte van alle nieuwe trainingsdata en speciale aanbiedingen.
 Aarzel niet langer en schrijf je vandaag nog in om je SAFe kennis naar een hoger niveau te tillen!
 Schrijf je nu in en word een SAFe professional!
 Training 1
Leading SAFe® - Thriving in the Digital Age with Business Agility
 2 dagen
Training 2
SAFe® Release Train Engineer - SAFe Execution
 3 dagen
Training 3
SAFe® Product Owner/Product Manager training
 2 dagen
 Training 4
SAFe® Scaled Scrum Master
 2 dagen
Training 5
SAFe® LPM - Lean Portfolio Management
 2 dagen

default.title: SAFe ACADEMY
default.content:
SAFe® Academy
Welcome to our training courses!
Are you looking to expand your skills and knowledge in a specific field?
We offer comprehensive and interactive training sessions designed to help you achieve your goals and reach new heights in your career.
Our expert and SAFe® authorized instructors have years of experience in their respective fields and are dedicated to providing hands-on, practical training that will give you the tools you need to succeed.
With our flexible scheduling options, you can learn at your own pace and on your own schedule.
Enroll today and take the first step towards reaching your full potential!
Find the right course for you
Choosing the right course can be a daunting task, with so many options available it can be hard to know where to start.
The key to finding the right course for you is to identify your goals and what you hope to achieve from the training.
Within SAFe there are 6 options:
Foundation courses
Process oriented courses
Content oriented courses
Technology oriented courses
Transformation oriented courses
Branche specific courses
Once you have a clear idea of what you want to achieve, you can start researching the different courses that are available and determine which one will best help you reach your goals.
Which SAFe® course is right for you?

default.title: RESOURCES
default.content:
Resources
There are several sources available for learning about the Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) and getting guidance on how to implement it in an organization.
Some of these include:
 The official SAFe website (scaledagile.com) - This is the primary source of information about SAFe and includes a wealth of resources, including a description of the framework, case studies, and training and certification options.
 SAFe Community Platform - This is an online community for SAFe practitioners where you can connect with others who are using SAFe, share experiences and best practices, and get answers to your questions.
 Books on SAFe - There are several books available on SAFe, written by experts in the field, that provide in-depth guidance on how to implement the framework in an organization.
 SAFe training and certification - There are several training options available for SAFe, including online courses, in-person workshops, and certification programs.
 SAFe user groups - There are SAFe user groups are all over the world where you can connect with others who are using SAFe and share best practices.
 SAFe event - there are SAFe events like summits and forums that provide opportunities to learn from experts, network with other SAFe practitioners, and stay up-to-date on the latest developments in the framework.

default.title: ABOUT US
default.content:
About Major Milestones
An international full service leading provider of agile transformation, lean agile, and DevOps services.
Our mission is to help organizations become more adaptive, efficient, and innovative by embracing agile methodologies and practices.
With years of experience and a team of certified experts, we have a proven track record of helping companies of all sizes and industries successfully implement agile transformations, lean agile, and DevOps.
We have served some of the largest SAFe® organizations of Europe.
Our core services include interim-management, agile coaching, training, consulting, and support.
We work closely with our clients to understand their unique needs and goals, and tailor our approach to best fit their organization.
At Major Milestones B.V. we believe that agility is not just about technology, but about a cultural shift that empowers teams to work in a more collaborative, customer-centric, and data-driven way.
We look forward to the opportunity to help your organization become more agile.
Roel Peels – CEO/Founder
Meet Roel Peels, the CEO of Major Milestones BV which he already founded in 1999.
Roel is a seasoned SAFe® expert with over 35 years of experience in the industry.
He has a passion for helping organizations become more adaptive, efficient, and innovative, and has a proven track record of delivering successful agile transformations, lean agile, and DevOps implementations at the largest SAFe® implementations in Europe.
Roel has a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities that come with adopting agile methodologies and practices and is able to provide valuable insights and guidance to organizations of all sizes and industries.
Prior to starting Major Milestones, Roel held leadership roles at Digital Equipment, Sun Microsystems, Siemens Nixdorf.
His latest regular job position was at Exodus Corporation Limited, where he led as senior VP Northern Europe large-scale digital transformations and helped organizations achieve significant improvements in productivity, quality, and customer satisfaction.
"Roel originally graduated in Mechanical Engineering and Business Economics, later completing a Master's degree in Change Management at the Erasmus University in Rotterdam, as well as various psychology courses including NLP and Group Dynamic Processes."

default.title: privacy
default.content:
Privacy policy
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information when you use our website/portal.
We are committed to ensuring the privacy and security of your personal information.
By using our website/portal, you consent to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
 Information We Collect
 Personal Information: We may collect personal information, such as your name, email address, contact information, and any other information you voluntarily provide to us when you interact with our website/portal.
Log Data: When you visit our website/portal, our servers automatically record certain log information, such as your IP address, browser type, referring/exit pages, and timestamps.
We use this information to analyze trends, administer the website/portal, and track users' movements.
Cookies and Similar Technologies: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze website usage, and personalize content.
You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
 How We Use Your Information
 Provide and Improve Services: We use your personal information to provide you with the services and information you request, and to improve and customize our website/portal to better meet your needs.
Communication: We may use your personal information to communicate with you, respond to your inquiries, and provide customer support.
Analytics and Research: We may use your information for analytics purposes, such as analyzing user behavior and trends, and conducting research to improve our website/portal.
Legal Compliance: We may use and disclose your personal information to comply with applicable laws, regulations, legal processes, or enforceable governmental requests.
 Information Sharing and Disclosure
 We respect your privacy and do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
However, we may share your personal information in the following circumstances:
Service Providers: We may engage trusted third-party service providers to assist us in operating our website/portal and providing services to you.
These service providers have access to your personal information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated to protect your information.
Legal Requirements: We may disclose your personal information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities (e.g., court orders, government agencies).
 Data Security
 We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.
However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
 Your Rights and Choices
 Access and Update: You may access and update your personal information by contacting us using the contact information provided at the end of this Privacy Policy.
Opt-Out: You can opt-out of receiving promotional communications from us by following the unsubscribe instructions provided in the emails or contacting us directly.
Do Not Track: Our website/portal does not respond to "Do Not Track" signals.
However, you can modify your browser settings to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent.
 Changes to this Privacy Policy
 We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
Any changes will be posted on this page, and the date of the latest revision will be indicated at the top.
We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any updates.
 Contact Us
 If you have any questions or concerns about our Privacy Policy or the handling of your personal information, please contact us using the contact information provided on our website/portal.

default.title: cookies
default.content:
Cookies Policy
This Cookies Policy explains how our Portal uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience and collect information about your usage of the Portal.
By continuing to browse or use our Portal, you agree to our use of cookies as described in this policy.
 What are cookies?
 Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit certain websites.
They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, enhance user experience, and provide information to the website owners.
 How we use cookies
 We use cookies for the following purposes:
Essential cookies: These cookies are necessary for the operation of our Portal and enable you to navigate and use its features.
Without these cookies, certain functionalities may be unavailable.
Analytical cookies: We use analytical cookies to collect information about how visitors use our Portal.
This helps us analyze and improve the performance and functionality of our Portal.
The information collected is anonymized and does not identify individual users.
Functional cookies: These cookies allow our Portal to remember choices you make and provide enhanced features and personalization.
They may be set by us or third-party providers whose services we have added to our Portal.
Advertising cookies: We may use advertising cookies to deliver relevant advertisements to you based on your interests.
These cookies track your browsing habits and enable us to tailor advertising content to your preferences.
Third-party cookies: Our Portal may include content and services provided by third parties.
These third parties may set cookies on your device while you interact with their content, such as embedded videos or social media sharing buttons.
We have no control over these cookies and their usage.
Please refer to the respective third party's privacy and cookies policies for more information.
 Managing cookies
 You have the option to accept or decline cookies.
Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can modify your browser settings to decline cookies if you prefer.
However, please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality and user experience of our Portal.
You can usually manage cookie settings through your browser's settings or options.
The "Help" function within your browser should provide you with the necessary instructions.
For more information about managing cookies, please visit www.allaboutcookies.org/manage-cookies/.
 Changes to our Cookies Policy
 We may update our Cookies Policy from time to time.
Any changes will be posted on this page, and the date of the latest revision will be indicated at the top.
We encourage you to review this Cookies Policy periodically for any updates or changes.
 Contact us
 If you have any questions or concerns about our use of cookies or this Cookies Policy, please contact us using the contact information provided on our Portal.
